final_candidate.head: BOUND_EXTERNALLY_AFTER_AMEND
final_candidate.self_reference_note: A tracked blob cannot contain the cryptographic identity of the commit and tree that contain that same blob. Exact final HEAD/tree are recorded by the post-amend detached proof output.

comparison_method: Accepted candidate Git blob OIDs compared with the staged/index changed-path boundary; every path outside the exact packet root must remain absent from the diff and therefore retain the listed blob OID.
